SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_HUAGU_MIANZHANG_P: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_PHASING_POWER.sma: At the start of each turn, gain a random [blue]{MinDex}[/blue]-[blue]{MaxDex}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_TROUBLE_AGAIN_POW: At the start of your turn, if no enemy has [gold]Weak[/gold], add [gold]Table Flip[/gold] to your hand.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_SERVANT_PO: At the start of each turn, add {GeneratedCard} to your hand.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_NEUTRAL_AM: When you draw [gold]Giant Rock[/gold] or [gold]Salvo Strike[/gold], play it on a random target.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_SENTRY_POW: Cards with "Strike" in their name deal [blue]1[/blue] additional damage.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_TWO_WORD_P: At the start of each turn, {TargetingDescription} deal [blue]{SnapshotDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage [blue]{Repeat:diff()}[/blue] times.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_LOUD_SECRET_PLOT_: Whenever you play an Attack or Skill that targets ALL enemies or multiple random enemies, while only one enemy can be targeted, that card resolves an additional [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:time|times}.

Whenever you play an Attack or Skill that targets ALL enemies or multiple random enemies, while only one enemy can be targeted, that card resolves an additional [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:time|times}.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_THE_ARROGANT_FALL: At the start of your next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_BURNING_POWER.des: Burning creatures take damage at the start of their turn. Each turn, Burning has a [blue]{ClearChance}%[/blue] chance to be cleared. If not cleared, this chance increases by [blue]25%[/blue].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_BURNING_POWER.sma: At the start of {OnPlayer:your turn, take|its turn, takes} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, then [gold]Burning[/gold] has a [blue]{ClearChance}%[/blue] chance to be cleared. If not cleared, this chance increases by [blue]25%[/blue].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_FUEL_ABUNDANT_POW: Increase the [gold]Burning[/gold] applied by your next card that applies [gold]Burning[/gold].
Your next card that applies [gold]Burning[/gold] applies [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional [gold]Burning[/gold]. Then this power is removed.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_BURNING_LI: When this Script ends, add {GeneratedCard} into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_ONE_MAN_ON: After your [gold]Plating[/gold] triggers, lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold] and trigger it 1 additional time.
After your [gold]Plating[/gold] triggers, lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold] and trigger it [blue]1[/blue] additional time.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_GOOD_FIRE_POWER.s: [gold]Burning[/gold] you apply is increased by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SUPERNATURALLY_WI: If you play an [gold]Exhaust[/gold] card in a turn, draw additional cards at the start of your next turn.
If you play an [gold]Exhaust[/gold] card in a turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional {Amount:plural:card|cards} at the start of your next turn.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_CHICKEN_FOOT_CHEE: For {Amount} {Amount:plural:turn|turns}, [gold]Strike[/gold] cards you play target 2 random enemies instead.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_SCRIPT_EXECUTION_: While only one enemy can be targeted, [gold]Attacks[/gold] you play that target ALL enemies or multiple random enemies deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_POWER_GOOD_BROTHER_TANG: After you play a [gold]Script[/gold] card, gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. This value is affected by [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
